For those who didn’t know, Hilomonke is not going to be updated anymore (The creator said it) It was a fun game at first when it still used the Gtag models (i did not say that it was good Hilo took the gtag models) But the game was fun back then when it had horror mode and stuff. But then the game started getting so many remakes to the point it got boring.

It was good but at-last, all things must come to an end.
